curation_notes: Primary location htdocs/product/card.php derived from the advisory description which explicitly names product/card.php and the statut_buy parameter. The patch adds type-safe filtering ('int', 'alpha', 'aZ09') to multiple GETPOST calls that previously had no sanitization. Secondary location htdocs/core/class/html.form.class.php (select_thirdparty_list) derived from the patch diff, which adds SQL injection detection on the $filter parameter before it is interpolated into a SQL query. The main.inc.php and societe/ajax/company.php changes are supporting infrastructure fixes, not direct vulnerability locations. Noisy patch: 4 non-test source files were modified. Vulnerability class sql-injection confirmed by CWE-89, advisory description, and patch content.
